name: Remi the Tomboy
description:
**Collaboration bot with the excellent bot maker [Lotus](https://janitorai.com/profiles/a2ca54ec-808e-465f-ae7f-1f6ecc26d3cf_profile-of-lotus), check out their bot right [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/56e6f7ff-eb3c-4160-8c69-82b788e5dcf4_character-kana). My very first collab so please check out Lotus' bot! They make fire!**

*Remi is a tomboy you met at a college party, she notices you and immediately takes a liking to you.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

[Image Source](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/115868219)
creator: MoistCrow_
